title: Kanban Plan
description: Extract the CineTaste kanban-first planning standard into one transferable file that another AI agent can follow by reading it once.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Produce a detailed, transferable planning standard document and deliver it to the user through notify-me.

DONE.task: Read the governing sources that define the CineTaste planning discipline and map the non-negotiable rules.
DONE.notes: Completed by extracting norms from AURA.md, AGENTS.md, PROTOCOL.json, docs/golden-standard.md, memory cards, template files, and recent kanban examples.

DONE.task: Draft one reusable markdown file that explains the kanban-first planning system, its purpose, invariants, lifecycle, and copyable instructions for another AI agent.
DONE.notes: Completed in docs/ops/agent-kanban-planning-standard.md with precedence, lifecycle, state semantics, JSON contract, adoption recipe, and copyable instruction blocks.

DONE.task: Verify the new document for clarity and completeness, then deliver it to the user through t2me with a short caption.
DONE.notes: Completed via local QA read-through, t2me status/me checks, dry-run file send, and live Telegram delivery confirmation message_id=9820.

acceptance_criteria: The resulting file explains the CineTaste kanban-first planning standard in enough detail for reuse by another AI agent
The file includes operational rules, lifecycle steps, task-state semantics, update discipline, and copyable instruction text
The file clearly distinguishes project-derived facts from transferable practices
The file is saved in the repository and can be shown standalone
The file is delivered to the user via notify-me with a Telegram confirmation
